generated_assessment.reasoning: The baseline is already negative (-137) and ALIGNED with the adversarial goal of decreasing trust. The T4 orchestrated multi-turn operation supplies reinforcing arguments over weeks, which fits the profile's high openness to ideas (94th pct) and low deliberation (20th pct): the person is intellectually curious but does not pause to critically assess incoming confirmatory content. Low self-discipline (29th pct) and very low activity level (3rd pct) mean little counter-search, making sustained exposure effective. Very low neuroticism (4th pct) and low anger/hostility (8th pct) dampen strong emotional intensification, so the movement is moderate (38 points) rather than extreme, producing a post score 38 points below baseline.
